_comment: Goalie-tab proof input for the NHL 25 / 6s / goalie club-member slice. Hand-keyed from research/Previous_NHL_Stats/NHL_25/team_leaderboard__08.png — the unified CLUBS → members table sorted by SHUTOUT PERIODS, scrolled to expose the right-side goalie columns. Pratt2016 is the only goalie member visible (separated from the 9 skaters by a thin divider). Visible goalie columns used: GAA, GA (→ total_goals_against), SV (→ total_saves), SV% (→ save_pct), SO (→ shutouts). W/L/OTL are not visible in this screenshot and intentionally remain null in the canonical row — they can be filled by a later screenshot via the same merge mechanism. Skater-cameo stats Pratt has from his 6 skater appearances belong to a separate role_group='skater' row and are not imported here.
